u_smoothSigma = 2.0; \nfloat u_featherRadius = 4.0; \nfloat balancedTransition(float value) {\n    return value * value * (3.0 - 2.0 * value);\n}\nfloat hybridBlur(sampler2D tex, vec2 uv, vec2 texelSize, float edgeIntensity, float sigma) {\n    float edgeWeight = smoothstep(u_highThreshold * 0.8, u_highThreshold, edgeIntensity);\n    if (edgeWeight < u_highThreshold * 0.8) {\n        return
